name: package_id
description: CKAN package UUID. Primary key. FK target for semantic.columns.package_id and raw.documents.package_id.

name: summary
description: English LLM-generated summary, 2-4 sentences. Source text embedded into `embedding`.

name: grain
description: Inferred per-row grain, e.g. 'program-year', 'province-fiscal-year'. Best-effort; NULL when undecidable.

name: measures
description: LLM-inferred measure concepts (e.g. 'expenditure_cad', 'headcount'). Empty array allowed.

name: dimensions
description: LLM-inferred dimension concepts (e.g. 'province', 'fiscal_year'). Empty array allowed.

name: date_range_start
description: Earliest covered period, best effort. NULL when the dataset has no temporal axis or it cannot be inferred.

name: date_range_end
description: Latest covered period, best effort. NULL when undecidable.

name: representative_document_id
description: raw.documents.document_id of the resource the enrichment pass used for column extraction and sample rows. NULL for rows enriched before the picker persisted its choice; backfilled by `semantic-enrich datasets-backfill-representative`.

name: embedding
description: Dense embedding vector over `summary`. Array length is fixed by the embedding model chosen by the enrichment pipeline (Qwen3-Embedding-0.6B = 1024 dims). BigQuery does not enforce array length; a model swap is a load-time concern, not a schema-time concern. Stored inline as ARRAY<FLOAT64>; no vector index is created at this scale.

name: generated_at
description: Wall-clock time the enrichment service produced this row. Used to detect stale enrichment when source resources change.
